weeklyFocus.headline: iPhone 17 Launch + Better Value Push + HINT Month On Us
weeklyFocus.context: iPhone 17 On Us for switchers (no trade-in), Galaxy S26 Ultra On Us with new line on Beyond. Better Value 3 lines $140/mo with Netflix, Hulu, Apple TV+, T-Satellite; push HINT on every call with code MONTHONUS.

trending.buzz: iPhone 17 On Us — no trade-in needed
trending.source: T-Mobile.com hero banner, TV ads, social
trending.repTip: Switchers on Beyond or Better Value (3 lines). No trade-in. Via 24 monthly bill credits.
WhatsApp, AllTrails, and more work via satellite now. Included on Beyond or $10/mo add-on.
On Us when you switch on Beyond or Better Value — no trade-in. Thinnest iPhone ever.

trending.buzz: T-Mobile families saved $3,700 vs AT&T & Verizon over 5 years
trending.repTip: Based on actual bills with 3+ lines. Great closer when someone says they're happy with their carrier.

currentPromos.name: iPhone 17 On Us (Switchers)
currentPromos.details: Free iPhone 17, no trade-in needed. Via 24 monthly bill credits on Experience Beyond or Better Value (3 lines); port from AT&T, Verizon, Claro, UScellular, Xfinity, Spectrum, Liberty PR.

commonObjections.objection: I don't want 24 months of bill credits
commonObjections.response: No contract — you can leave anytime. The credits just offset the device cost monthly, and most people stay because the value is unbeatable.

currentPromos.name: Galaxy S26 Ultra On Us (New Line)
currentPromos.details: Free with new line on Experience Beyond ($100+/mo w/ AutoPay). No trade-in needed, up to $1,300 via 24 monthly bill credits.

commonObjections.response: Lots of people say that until they try the S26 Ultra's S Pen and Nightography camera. But iPhone 17 is On Us too — either way you win.

currentPromos.name: Home Internet Month On Us + Up to $300 Back
currentPromos.details: Code MONTHONUS at checkout. Plus up to $300 back via prepaid Mastercard ($100 Rely, $200 Amplified, $300 All-In). Digital activations only, requires postpaid voice line.

commonObjections.objection: I already have internet at home
commonObjections.response: Most cable companies charge $60-80/mo. Our All-In is $30/mo bundled — plus a month free and up to $300 back, no contract, no data caps.

currentPromos.name: Pay Off Your Phone — Up to $800/Line
currentPromos.details: We pay off your current phone up to $800/line via prepaid Mastercard, typically within 15 days. Requires new financed phone, eligible trade-in, port-in, qualifying service.

commonObjections.objection: I still owe money on my phone
commonObjections.response: That's exactly what this is for. We pay off up to $800 of what you owe so switching is painless.

currentPromos.name: Better Value Plan — Save $1,000+/Year
currentPromos.details: 3 lines for $140/mo (after AutoPay). Includes Netflix, Hulu, Apple TV+, T-Satellite, unlimited premium data, 4K streaming, $5/mo watch/tablet lines, 5-Year Price Guarantee.

commonObjections.response: That's the family sweet spot. For 1-2 lines, Experience More at $90/mo single line gives a similar feature set.

planUpdates.change: $105/mo single, $170/mo 3 lines w/ AutoPay. Best deals, yearly upgrades, T-Satellite, Netflix/Hulu/AppleTV+, unlimited hotspot, 4K, 15GB international data in 215+ countries.
planUpdates.talkingPoint: The premium play — best device deals, yearly upgrades, and T-Satellite even off-grid.

planUpdates.change: $90/mo single, $185/mo 3 lines before AutoPay. Strong trade-in deals, 2-year upgrades, Netflix/Hulu/AppleTV+, unlimited premium data.
planUpdates.talkingPoint: Sweet spot for individuals and couples — premium perks at mid-tier pricing.

planUpdates.change: 3+ lines required. $140/mo for 3 lines w/ AutoPay. Netflix/Hulu/AppleTV+, T-Satellite, unlimited premium data, 4K, $5/mo watch/tablet, 5-Year Price Guarantee.
planUpdates.talkingPoint: Everything families want — $46.67/line with Netflix, Hulu, and T-Satellite built in.

planUpdates.change: $65/mo single, $120/mo 3 lines before AutoPay. Basic unlimited with 5G. Fewer promos but iPhone 17e On Us qualifies.
planUpdates.talkingPoint: Budget-friendly unlimited — iPhone 17e On Us still works here.

competitiveIntel.intel: AT&T launched Unlimited Your Way 2.0 — stripped ALL streaming perks from every plan.
competitiveIntel.talkingPoint: AT&T removed every streaming perk; we include Netflix, Hulu, and Apple TV+ — that's $30+/mo in value they just took away.

competitiveIntel.intel: AT&T raising legacy plan prices again in April 2026 ($10-20/mo increases) — at least the 4th hike in ~2 years.
competitiveIntel.talkingPoint: AT&T is raising prices again; our 5-Year Price Guarantee means your rate is locked.

competitiveIntel.intel: Verizon settled $100M class action over hidden fees that ballooned from $0.40 to $3.78/line/month.
competitiveIntel.talkingPoint: Verizon got sued for hidden fees that grew 9x; we're upfront about everything with a locked rate.

competitiveIntel.intel: T-Mobile families saved $3,700 vs AT&T/Verizon over 5 years (3+ lines, HarrisX Billing Snapshots Q3 2021-Q4 2025).
competitiveIntel.talkingPoint: Based on actual customer bills, T-Mobile families save $3,700 over 5 years vs AT&T and Verizon.

knownIssues.issue: Bill credits may take up to 2 billing cycles to appear on all promo devices
knownIssues.workaround: Set expectations upfront: credits typically start on the 2nd bill; escalate to care if missing after 2 full cycles.

knownIssues.issue: 90-day cancel rule: Customers who cancelled lines in past 90 days may need to reactivate before qualifying for promos
knownIssues.workaround: Check account history and guide them to reactivate first if they cancelled within 90 days.

knownIssues.issue: Home Internet prepaid card takes up to 14 weeks from rebate submission
knownIssues.workaround: Set expectations: register the code within 30 days of activation; card expires 6 months after issuance.

knownIssues.issue: Home Internet credits stop if you cancel any lines or change plans
knownIssues.workaround: Warn customers: bundle discount and promo credits stop if they cancel voice lines or switch plans.

knownIssues.issue: Better Value plan not available for 1 or 2 lines — minimum 3 lines required
knownIssues.workaround: Steer 1-2 line customers to Experience More or Experience Beyond instead.

openers: Checking things out for yourself or the whole family?
discovery: What phone and carrier are you on now?
What matters most — price, the phone, coverage, or extras like streaming?
keyMoves: Lead with iPhone 17 On Us — no trade-in for switchers.
Mention streaming perks: Netflix, Hulu, Apple TV+ included; AT&T stripped all theirs.
Drop the $3,700 savings stat vs AT&T/Verizon over 5 years.
closingTips: No pressure: 'Let me save this so you have the numbers when you're ready.'
Urgency: 'The iPhone 17 On Us deal is limited time.'
avoidMoves: Don't push hard — browsers need space.
Don't overwhelm with promos — pick the one that fits.

openers: Let's get you set up — what are you looking to grab today?
Great timing — do you know what device you want or want a recommendation?
discovery: How many lines do you need?
Switching from another carrier? We can pay off your phone up to $800.
keyMoves: Move quickly — they're ready; don't over-explain.
For 3+ lines: Better Value at $140/mo is the slam dunk.
Before checkout: 'Do you have internet at home? $30/mo bundled.'
closingTips: Direct: 'I can get you set up in 15 minutes with same-day delivery.'
After device: pitch watch or tablet line at $5/mo.
avoidMoves: Don't slow them down with too many options.
Don't forget Home Internet — ask every customer.

openers: Looking to upgrade or add someone to the account?
Adding a line for someone, or upgrading your own device?
discovery: What device are you on now? Let's check trade-in value.
What plan are you on? Newer plans may unlock bigger device deals.
keyMoves: Check trade-in value immediately — show them the math.
If on old plan: compare to Experience More or Better Value for streaming and T-Satellite.
Always ask: 'Who's your home internet provider?'
closingTips: Show side-by-side: current cost vs new plan with credits and streaming value.
avoidMoves: Don't assume they want the same brand — ask.
Better Value requires 3+ lines; don't pitch to solo customers.

openers: Let me pull that up and get it sorted.
No worries — what's the order number or what are you seeing?
discovery: When did you place the order?
Did you get a confirmation email or tracking number?
keyMoves: Resolve their issue FIRST — earn trust before pivoting.
Set expectations: bill credits can take up to 2 billing cycles.
After resolution: 'By the way, do you have home internet? Month On Us deal right now.'
closingTips: Service-to-sales: 'All set! Quick question — who's your home internet provider?'
Home Internet: '$30/mo bundled, $300 back. Want me to check your address?'
avoidMoves: Don't pitch before resolving their issue.
Don't make them feel the support call was just a sales opportunity.

openers: Let's figure this out — what's going on with your device?
No stress — walk me through what you're seeing.
keyMoves: Fix the issue first — build trust and gratitude.
After fix: pivot to Protection 360 — '$0 screen repairs.'
Always ask about Home Internet while you have them.
closingTips: Gratitude pivot: 'Glad that's working! Do you have a smartwatch or tracker?'
P360 pitch: 'If you had P360, this would be fully covered.'
avoidMoves: Don't rush the fix to get to the sale.
If they're frustrated, skip the sales pivot entirely.

openers: Let me pull up your account — what do you need help with?
No problem — is this about billing, plan changes, or something else?
discovery: What specifically are you seeing on your account?
How long have you been with T-Mobile?
keyMoves: While in the account: look for old plans, missing P360, no Home Internet.
If 3+ lines: mention Better Value at $140/mo — could save money with better perks.
closingTips: 'While I was in your account, I noticed a couple things that could save you money — want to hear them?'
Home Internet: '$30/mo, no contract, 5-Year Price Guarantee, month free plus $300 back.'
avoidMoves: Don't upsell if they're frustrated about a billing error — fix it first.
Be careful with plan changes on accounts with active bill credits — can kill existing promos.

planSellingGuide.positioning: The absolute best — yearly upgrades, T-Satellite, all streaming.
planSellingGuide.idealCustomer: Premium seekers, frequent travelers, tech enthusiasts, families who want it all.
planSellingGuide.whyNotCheaper: You lose yearly upgrades, T-Satellite, and the best device deals. The difference is $15/line — less than one streaming subscription.
planSellingGuide.whyNotPricier: This IS the top tier. Nothing above this.

whyItMatters.young-adult: Always have the latest phone without waiting 2 years.
whyItMatters.family: Hand down last year's phone to the kids — everyone stays current.
whyItMatters.senior: Your phone never falls behind on updates or support.
whyItMatters.business: Always have the best camera and tools for work.
whyItMatters.budget: Trade value stays high when you upgrade yearly — saves money long-term.
whyItMatters.switcher: You're already switching — start with yearly upgrades built in.

whyItMatters.young-adult: Festival in the desert? Camping? Your phone still works.
whyItMatters.family: Kids on a trip with no signal? They can still reach you.
whyItMatters.senior: Peace of mind — your phone works even in remote areas.
whyItMatters.business: Never miss a critical message, even in dead zones.
whyItMatters.budget: You'd pay $10/mo to add this on a cheaper plan. It's included here.
whyItMatters.switcher: No other carrier has this — genuine T-Mobile exclusive.

whyItMatters.young-adult: That's $30+/mo in streaming you don't pay separately.
whyItMatters.family: Everyone gets their own profile — no more password sharing.
whyItMatters.senior: All your shows in one place, included in your bill.
whyItMatters.business: Entertainment for travel days, included at no extra cost.
whyItMatters.budget: $30/mo in streaming value makes this plan cheaper than it looks.
whyItMatters.switcher: AT&T just stripped all streaming. We include it.

features.feature: Best device deals (no trade-in for switchers)

whyItMatters.young-adult: iPhone 17 On Us, no trade-in. Keep your old phone as backup.
whyItMatters.family: Multiple phones On Us when you switch — huge day-one savings.
whyItMatters.senior: Get a new phone free without the hassle of trading in.
whyItMatters.business: Equip the whole team with flagship devices at no device cost.
whyItMatters.budget: Free phone = $0 device payment on your bill.
whyItMatters.switcher: Free flagship phone, keep your old one — that's why you switch.

demographicPitch.young-adult: Yearly upgrades, satellite for festivals and trips, and $30+/mo in streaming included. The plan that keeps up with you.
demographicPitch.family: Best phones, Netflix for movie night, T-Satellite so the kids can always reach you. $170/mo for 3 lines with AutoPay.
demographicPitch.senior: Your phone always works — even in remote areas. Streaming included, new phone every year.
demographicPitch.business: Best devices, global roaming in 215+ countries, satellite backup for dead zones. Professional-grade wireless.
demographicPitch.budget: Streaming ($30/mo) + yearly upgrades (higher trade value) + T-Satellite ($10/mo elsewhere). Beyond actually costs less than it looks.
demographicPitch.switcher: Free iPhone 17, no trade-in, yearly upgrades, satellite connectivity. The plan that makes the switch worth it.

planSellingGuide.upgradeFrom: You're paying for data you can't fully use. Beyond unlocks 4K streaming, yearly upgrades, and T-Satellite — for about $15 more per line.
planSellingGuide.anchorPrice: $57/line for 3 lines — less than $2/day per person.

planSellingGuide.positioning: The sweet spot. Great deals, all the perks, 2-year upgrades.
planSellingGuide.idealCustomer: Individuals, couples, people who want premium without the top price.
planSellingGuide.whyNotCheaper: Essentials loses streaming perks and gets worse device deals.
planSellingGuide.whyNotPricier: Beyond adds yearly upgrades and T-Satellite — worth it only if you upgrade phones often or travel to remote areas.

whyItMatters.young-adult: $30+/mo in streaming included — that alone closes the gap with Essentials.
whyItMatters.family: Everyone gets their streaming profiles without extra subscriptions.
whyItMatters.senior: All your shows bundled in one simple bill.
whyItMatters.business: Entertainment included for downtime — no extra apps to manage.
whyItMatters.budget: The streaming value alone makes this cheaper than Essentials + paying for Netflix.
whyItMatters.switcher: AT&T stripped all streaming; we include Netflix, Hulu, and Apple TV+.

whyItMatters.young-adult: Trade your current phone and get a flagship for nearly free.

demographicPitch.young-adult: All the streaming, premium data, and strong device deals without paying for yearly upgrades you might not use. $90/mo single line.
demographicPitch.family: Netflix, Hulu, Apple TV+ for everyone, plus solid trade-in deals. Great for couples or small families.

demographicPitch.budget: Once you add up the streaming value ($30/mo), Experience More is actually cheaper than Essentials + separate subscriptions.
demographicPitch.switcher: Great device deals, all streaming included, premium data. The plan most switchers land on.

planSellingGuide.upgradeFrom: You're missing Netflix, Hulu, and Apple TV+ on your current plan. Experience More adds $30+/mo in streaming for about $20 more per line.

planSellingGuide.whyNotPricier: Beyond adds yearly upgrades — most families don't need that.

whyItMatters.budget: The price you sign up for is the price you keep.
whyItMatters.switcher: AT&T raises prices every year; we guarantee yours for 5.

demographicPitch.young-adult: Get on the family plan — Netflix, Hulu, Apple TV+, and T-Satellite for $47/line with 3 lines.
demographicPitch.family: Everything the family needs: streaming, T-Satellite, $5 watch lines, and a locked price. $140/mo for 3 lines with AutoPay.

planSellingGuide.upgradeFrom: You're on Essentials and missing streaming, T-Satellite, and better device deals. Better Value adds all of that for roughly the same per-line cost with 3 lines.

planSellingGuide.whyNotPricier: If they watch any streaming or want device deals, Experience More pays for itself.
